technical_replicate: Cell viability across various groups was assessed using the Cell Counting Kit-8 (CCK-8, Dojindo, Japan).
experimental_design: AD treatment heightened the susceptibility of HCC cells to Erastin-mediated ferroptosis.
factor_value: Human HCC cell lines with PTPMT1 knockout and PTPMT1 overexpression were established.
number_of_biological_replicates: The text mentions that the mice were categorized into four experimental groups.
